Frequently Asked Questions

Can I cancel anytime?▾

Yes, you can cancel your subscription at any time. You will keep access until the end of your billing period.

Do I need to show my face?▾

Absolutely not. FaceFlow is specifically designed for faceless content creation. All tools work without any camera or microphone.

How does the AI script generator work?▾

Enter a topic and our AI analyzes trending content in that niche to generate a hook, full outline, detailed sections, and a call-to-action — all optimized for watch time.

Can I use this for multiple channels?▾

The Pro plan supports up to 5 channels. The Empire plan offers unlimited channels.

Is there a free trial for paid plans?▾

Yes, both Pro and Empire plans come with a 7-day free trial. No credit card required to start.

FaceFlow

AI-powered tools to create, grow, and monetize faceless YouTube channels.
